aids.title: SLFSD - Core Requirements
aids.content:
**S**afety - Same value agreed
**L**iveness - Live progress made
**F**ault tolerance - Failures handled
**S**ybil resistance - Stop fake identities
**D**ecentralization - Distributed control

Remember: 'Safe Living Finds Success Daily'

aids.title: Trilemma Triangle
aids.content:
DECENTRALIZATION
           /\
          /  \
         /    \
        /      \
   SECURITY----SCALABILITY

Pick any 2 sides, sacrifice the third.
Bitcoin: Top + Left (not scalable)
Solana: Left + Bottom (less decentralized)

aids.title: The Voting Analogy
aids.content: Imagine a vote where each person gets one vote. A rich person can't buy extra votes (Sybil resistance). In PoS, you can 'vote' proportional to your stake - creating 100 accounts with 1 token each = same power as 1 account with 100 tokens. No Sybil advantage!

aids.title: Safety vs Liveness Quick Guide
aids.content:
**Safety**: "Nothing bad happens"
- No double-spending
- No conflicting blocks
- Better to halt than be wrong

**Liveness**: "Something good happens"
- Transactions processed
- Network makes progress
- System stays usable

Partition: Must choose one!

aids.title: Trilemma Rhyme
aids.content:
Decentralized, secure, and fast,
No blockchain can do all that.
Pick two and leave one behind,
That's the trilemma you will find!
